mapper.select: SELECT * FROM( SELECT * FROM product ORDER BY pSalesRate DESC ) WHERE rownum BETWEEN 1 AND 12
SELECT * FROM productImg WHERE pno=#{pno} ORDER BY pImgStep

SELECT * FROM( SELECT rownum rn , r.* FROM( SELECT * FROM productReview WHERE pno=#{pno} order by rnum desc )r ) WHERE rn BETWEEN (#{cri.pageNum} - 1) * #{cri.amount} + 1 AND #{cri.pageNum} * #{cri.amount}
SELECT count(*) FROM productReview WHERE pno=#{pno}

SELECT * FROM( SELECT rownum rn, q.* FROM( SELECT * FROM productQnA ORDER BY pQnAGroupNo DESC , pQnAIndent )q ) WHERE rn BETWEEN (#{cri.pageNum} - 1) * #{cri.amount} + 1 AND #{cri.pageNum} * #{cri.amount}
SELECT count(*) FROM productQnA WHERE pno=#{pno}
SELECT count(*) FROM cart WHERE cartNo=#{cartNo}
SELECT count(*) FROM like_product WHERE userId=#{userId} AND pno=#{pno}
SELECT v.* FROM productOrder o INNER JOIN memberOrderList_view v ON o.orderNo = v.orderNo WHERE v.userId='Anonymous' AND o.recipient=#{recipient} AND o.orderPhone=#{orderPhone}
